task_completion.description: Verify the 'Related Accessories' field was added to the 'Default' product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' page of the 'Default' product type showing a field labeled 'Related Accessories' with the machine name 'field_related_accessories' and field type 'Entity reference'.

task_completion.description: Verify the field is configured to reference Products with unlimited values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the field settings or storage settings page showing 'Type of item to reference' set to 'Product' and 'Allowed number of values' set to 'Unlimited'.

task_completion.description: Verify the field display is configured as a Rendered entity using the Teaser view mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage display' page of the 'Default' product type showing the 'Related Accessories' field format set to 'Rendered entity'. The settings summary (gear icon) should indicate it uses the 'Teaser' view mode.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the edit page for the main product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product edit page for the main product (which is actually 'Apple MacBook Air M2 13-inch' in the database, despite the prompt asking for the Pro 16").

task_completion.description: Verify the correct accessories were added to the main product's 'Related Accessories' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Related Accessories' field on the main product's edit page populated with the two accessory products: 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' and 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the fields and products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for browser interactions with the Drupal admin UI. There should be no terminal windows using 'drush' commands to create fields or update nodes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the Drupal admin menus naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for sequential page loads (e.g., Structure -> Content types/Product types -> Manage fields -> Edit product) rather than jumping straight to a mocked final state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application layer by editing the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal scripts used to directly insert field configurations or product relationships into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected field machine name is 'field_related_accessories'. Note that the database contains slightly different product titles than the task description: the main product is 'Apple MacBook Air M2 13-inch' (not Apple MacBook Pro 16"), and the accessories are 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' and 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'.
